headline: Can Tesla Stock Capitalize on the Market Rally Ahead of Earnings?
summary: Wall Street is looking for earnings per share of 36 cents, according to  FactSet  A year ago, Tesla reported first-quarter earnings of 27 cents.  EV deliveries and earnings, however, might not matter as much as what Musk and management say about AI-trained robo-taxis and robots.  At the closing bell on Thursday, Tesla stock was down 13% year to date and up 61% over the past 12 months.

EV deliveries and earnings, however, might not matter as much as what Musk and management say about AI-trained robo-taxis and robots.  At the closing bell on Thursday, Tesla stock was down 13% year to date and up 61% over the past 12 months.

headline: Nas.com Raises $27M Series A Led by Khosla Ventures as AI Unleashes the Biggest Wave of New Business Creation in History
summary: Nas.com, the AI platform built for the solopreneur economy, today announced $27 million in Series A funding led by Vinod Khosla and Nicole Fraenkel at Khosla Ventures. 500 Global participated alongside strategic angels including Shuo Wang, co-founder of Deel, Stanley Tang, co-founder of DoorDash, Scott Adelson, CEO of Houlihan Lokey, and Tim Ferriss, author of The 4-Hour Workweek.

headline: How The DoorDash (DASH) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Guidance AI Questions And Deals
summary: DoorDash’s analyst derived fair value estimate has shifted from US$258.00 to US$252.15, a small reset that still leaves plenty of debate around where the stock belongs. This trim lines up with recent research that frames DoorDash as a more mixed setup, with solid Q4 execution and marketplace trends set against sector wide multiple compression, higher discount rates, AI related questions, and an investment heavy period ahead. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the...

headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher As Bond Yields Ease
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Apr, 16 2026 E-mini S&P 500 futures are slightly higher ahead of the open, as investors weigh calmer bond markets against fresh signs of cost pressure. The US 10 year Treasury yield is sitting near recent lows, helped by progress in Iran US talks and softer oil prices, which eases worries about borrowing costs for households and businesses. At the same time, US import prices rose 0.8% in March, mainly because of fuel, which suggests that...

headline: Trump's Iran War 'Close To Over' Prediction, Bank Earnings Lift S&P 500, Nasdaq To Record Highs: These ETFs Gain
